decision: Collapsed estimated_builders=2 into a single builder (builder-3a) covering both walkthrough UI and the glossary route.
rationale: Walkthrough and glossary share the same route-registration plumbing, the same data dependency on GTOData.HANDS/GLOSSARY, and the same DOM patterns. Splitting would duplicate state and add an integration seam with no acceptance benefit. All five S3 assertions are satisfied by the single builder.
nested_equivalent: Under nested dispatch, the Overseer for section-3 would have spawned builder-3a (walkthrough) and builder-3b (glossary). Each would have produced a separate output.js. The integrator would have loaded both. Same observable behavior; same assertion coverage.
